blended.narrative: Mont-Tremblant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.

Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
